restaurants.introTemplate:
Hey {{business_name}}! 🍔

I noticed you have a great Restaurant listing on Google in {{location}}, but you don't have a website to showcase your menu and take direct online orders.

Today, everyone is ordering food online. If you don't have a website, you are losing loyal customers to competitors and also paying 25% to 30% commission to Swiggy and Zomato on every order. So, having your own website is essential to showcase your dishes beautifully, build your online presence, and receive direct online orders on your own website—where you keep 100% of your profits!

We build premium, custom restaurant websites starting at just ₹999! 🚀

See how your online menu and ordering website could look in these demo sites:
🌐 {{demo_link1}}
🌐 {{demo_link2}}

Call or message anytime to get your website ready!
